name: Surimi (artificial crab meat) Salad
directions: Combine surimi, avo, sprouts and celery in bowl.
Stir mayo, yogurt, horseradish& lemon juice together.
Add to surimi and toss gently.
Put lettuce leaves on 4 plates and divide salad on top.

name: Crab Salad on Croissant
directions: Chop crab into small pieces if necessary.
Combine all ingredients, mix well.
Chill for at least half an hour.
Serve on croissants with lettuce leaves.

name: Mr. Bayley's West Indies Salad
directions: Follow these instructions to the letter!
Spread half of onion over bottom of large bowl.
Cover with separated crab lumps.
Add the remaining onion.
Salt and pepper.
Pour oil, vinegar and ice water over all.
Cover and marinate 2-12 hours.
Toss lightly before serving.
Serve as a"salad" on a bed of lettuce or on crackers as an appetizer.
Variation: Substitute royal red shrimp for the crabmeat.

name: Shrimp or Crab Dip / Spread
directions: Mix cream cheese until soft and whipped.
Spread out on plate, top with crab and or shrimp, top that with sauce.
Sprinkle parsley on top for garnish.

name: Beggar"s Purses with Crab
directions: Mix together all the ingredients except the crepes and the blanched chive stalks.
Lay out the crepes on a flat surface and place a heaping tbsp of the crab mixture in the center of each crepe.
Draw up the crepes to make a bundle and tie a chive stalk arounf the neck of the bundle.
Serve immediately.

name: salsa crab dip
directions: cream together all ingriedients til smooth.
chill for 4 hours.
serve with crackers.

name: Crab and Avocado Salad
directions: Whisk together dressing ingredients in small bowl and set aside.
Mix peppers, avocado, and tomato in a medium bowl.  Fold in crab meat.
Place a cup of shredded lettuce in a large bowl and toss with dressing.
Divide greens equally onto 4 plates and top with crab mixture.
Drizzle additional dressing on top to taste.

name: Lump Crab - Avocado Salad
directions: Lightly toss the chopped vegetables with the crab meat - try to minimize breaking up the lumps.
Stir the remaining ingredients together and toss into the crab-vegetable mixture.
Chill at least one hour.
Peel and halve the avocados.  Place them on a bed of spring greens or butter lettuce.
Spoon the crab salad over the avocado halves.  Garnish with lemon wedges.

name: Crabby Devil Dip
directions: In a medium mixing bowl, combine cream cheese, onion, Worcestershire sauce, horseradish, crab meat and hot sauce. Spread the mixture in an 8-inch glass pie pan. Cover the cream cheese mixture with cocktail sauce. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
